title: On load, Browse mode shows a non-empty palette library (nomenclature, palette cards, or swatches) with multiple seeded items
On load (or after opening the manage/detail list), at least 6 user-manageable palettes are available with names visible
After creating a palette named 'Harbor Coastal' with valid swatches, the text 'Harbor Coastal' is visible in the library
After adding 3 new palettes on top of the seed set, the manage/list count shows exactly 3 more than the initial seeded count
After filtering by a period tag (with mixed periods present), only matching palettes/swatches remain visible
After editing a palette name to 'Evening Ochre', the text 'Evening Ochre' is visible and the previous name is not
After deleting a palette, that palette name is no longer visible in the library
After deleting all user-manageable palettes, an empty state is visible in the library region
After submitting create with an empty required palette name, the palettes count does not increase and validation feedback is visible
After switching among Nomenclature, Palette, and Swatch browse layouts, the active view indicator updates without full page navigation
After opening Detail/Editor for a palette and returning to Browse, both modes work without leaving the page
When hovering swatches, palette cards, or view toggles, a visible hover outline, wash, or label fade appears
